SlumsArena_South_Ulayim.description: You’re standing in the arena. From the center, you hear fighters shouting and the clash of steel, while a crowd of combatants gathers nearby — any of whom you can challenge. Not far from the fighting pit, you see a shop where you can buy all sorts of gear — if you’ve got the coin. On the opposite side, there’s the arena’s exit.

SlumsOfUlayim.description: You’re in the Slums of Ulayim, on Nameless Street. The stench of rot crawls up your nose as you trudge through this festering shithole, home to nothing but gutter filth — scum just like you. After a quick look around, you spot the Arena you just stumbled out of, a greasy spoon where you might scrape together a meal, and a flea-ridden flop that’s barely better than sleeping in a ditch. Farther up the street, the alleys widen into Desperate Street — if you’ve got the guts to go there.
